```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 58vh; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 1.2vh 4vw 1.8vh;">
  <div style="flex: 1; display: flex; flex-wrap: nowrap; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/christoph_huettl_md/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/HueC_297x337.jpg" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Christoph Huettl</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/rico_schmitt_msc-1/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/SchmittR_297x337.png" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Rico Schmitt</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://codemart.ro/codemart/zwei/crew" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://codemart.ro/codemart/img/53/portrait_leader@2x" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Lia Domide</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="#" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://codemart.ro/codemart/img/4878/portrait_staff@2x" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Romina Baila</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/dr_jil_meier/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/MeyerJ_297x337.jpg" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Jil Meier</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/halgurd_taher_msc_phd-1/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/TaherT_297x337.jpg" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Halgurd Taher</strong></p>
      </div>
  </div>
  <div style="height: 1.5vh;"></div>
  <div style="flex: 1; display: flex; flex-wrap: nowrap; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; gap: 12px;">
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/dr_med_konstantin_buelau_md/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://brainsimulation.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/gehirnsimulation/konstantin_337.jpg" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Konstantin Buelau</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/dr_dionysios_perdikis-1/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/perdikis_d_297x337.jpg" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Dionysios Perdikis</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/dr_dionysios_perdikis-1/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://neurologie.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/neurologie/Mitarbeiter_neu/schirner-m_297x337.jpg" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Michael Schirner</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/en/metas/person_detail/person/address_detail/leon_stefanovski_md/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://brainsimulation.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/gehirnsimulation/charite_photo_big-337-leon.jpg" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Leon Stefanovski</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://claude.com/claude-code" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/76263028?s=200&v=4" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Claude Code</strong></p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;">
        <a href="https://neurologie.charite.de/metas/person/person/address_detail/univ_prof_dr_med_petra_ritter/" target="_blank">
                    <img src="https://brainsimulation.charite.de/fileadmin/user_upload/microsites/m_cc15/gehirnsimulation/Ritter_155x200.png" style="width: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); height: clamp(128px, 11vw, 180px); object-fit: cover; border-radius: 50%; filter: grayscale(100%);">
        </a>
                <p style="margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 0.66em; line-height: 1.2;"><strong>Petra Ritter</strong></p>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
